tech_news.title: S. 'Soma' Somasegar, 1966-2026: Microsoft and Madrona leader was a champion of developers and startups - GeekWire
tech_news.description: Friends and colleagues remembered S. "Soma" Somasegar, the longtime Microsoft developer leader and Madrona managing director, as a generous mentor to developers and founders, and a fixture of Seattle's tech community.

tech_news.title: Wear OS 7 will keep track of deliveries and sports scores on your wrist - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google’s Wear OS 7 update, announced at I/O, adds iPhone-style Live Updates and “Wear Widgets” to make it easier to keep track of things right from your smartwatch.

tech_news.title: Google and Xreal’s ‘Project Aura’ XR Smart Glasses Are Legit - Gizmodo
tech_news.description: The spatial computing experience isn't as immersive as an XR headset, but maybe it doesn't need to be.

tech_news.title: Google caps off I/O 2026 day one with Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 release - Android Authority
tech_news.description: As if you didn't have enough Google news to catch up with after I/O's keynote, we've also got a new Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 release.

tech_news.title: You can now talk to your Gmail inbox, as seen at Google IO 2026 - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google expands Gmail’s AI Inbox with conversational voice search, letting users ask Gemini to find buried email details.

tech_news.title: Plex’s 200% Lifetime Pass price hike tries forcing users to another subscription - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Plex says that it has considered getting rid of Lifetime Passes.

tech_news.title: Google Antigravity 2.0 goes after Claude Code and OpenAI Codex with a full agent-first rebuild - The Times of India
tech_news.description: Tech News News: Google has taken the IDE off Antigravity. What is left, announced at I/O 2026, is a standalone desktop app built around agents rather than a code edit.

tech_news.title: Google Flow AI video editing & music tools getting dedicated apps and Omni upgrades - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: As its competition takes a break, Google is doubling down on video generation through Gemini, with Omni upgrades for it...

tech_news.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.
